properties.name: grails.databinding.trimStrings
properties.description: Whether to trim whitespace from String values during data binding.

properties.name: grails.databinding.convertEmptyStringsToNull
properties.description: Whether empty String values are converted to null during data binding.

properties.name: grails.databinding.autoGrowCollectionLimit
properties.description: The maximum size to which indexed collections can auto-grow during data binding.

properties.name: grails.databinding.dateFormats
properties.description: List of date format strings used to parse date values during data binding.

properties.name: grails.databinding.dateParsingLenient
properties.description: Whether date parsing is lenient (accepting invalid dates like Feb 30).
